description_long: This is a classic, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and elegant, carved details along the lower front skirt. The front features three spacious drawers, each adorned with ornate, dark metal handles, and two open shelf compartments above the drawers for additional storage or display. The cabinet stands on four short, turned legs, giving it a slightly elevated and traditional appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the back showing only two small, round fasteners or access points. The surface is smooth and painted in a uniform light color, likely white or off-white, with a matte finish. This piece would be suitable for use as a TV stand, sideboard, or storage unit in an urban living room, office, or public waiting area.
description: A classic white wooden cabinet with three drawers, ornate handles, and two open shelves, standing on turned legs with carved detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with ornate handles, two open shelves above, and decorative carving on the lower skirt.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, solid panel and the cabinet's depth, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a flat, unadorned surface with two small round fasteners or access points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a plain, solid panel.
